name: usgscsm
description: USGS Community Sensor Model (CSM) library compiled to WebAssembly for planetary photogrammetry in the browser

scripts.build: echo 'Note: WASM build requires Emscripten. See README for instructions.' && exit 1
scripts.size: ls -lh wasmbuild/dist/ 2>/dev/null || ls -lh wasm/dist/ 2>/dev/null || ls -lh dist/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'No dist/ found'
scripts.clean: rm -rf wasmbuild/ wasm/ build/ build-wasm/ dist/
scripts.prepublishOnly: test -d dist || (echo 'Error: dist/ not found. Build WASM first.' && exit 1)

author: USGS Astrogeology Science Center
